variables.label: Organization name
variables.description: Legal or display name of the organization.

variables.label: Legal entity name
variables.description: Registered legal entity name for the organization.

variables.label: Website
variables.description: Public website for the organization.

variables.label: Contact email
variables.description: General contact email for the organization.

variables.label: Security contact email
variables.description: Email address for security inquiries.

variables.label: Privacy contact email
variables.description: Email address for privacy inquiries.

variables.label: Country
variables.description: Primary country for the organization.

variables.label: Address
variables.description: Primary business address for the organization.

variables.label: Employee count
variables.description: Approximate number of employees in the organization.

variables.label: Industries
variables.description: Industries the organization operates in.

variables.label: Operating regions
variables.description: Geographic regions where the organization operates.

variables.label: Handles PII
variables.description: Whether the organization handles personally identifiable information.

variables.label: Handles sensitive data
variables.description: Whether the organization handles sensitive business, regulated, or high-risk data.

variables.label: Compliance goals
variables.description: Compliance programs or customer security goals the organization is working toward.

variables.label: Service name
variables.description: Name of the primary product or service offered by the organization.

variables.label: Service description
variables.description: Short description of the primary product or service.
variables.example: Cloud software for managing customer security reviews.

variables.label: Service URL
variables.description: Public URL where the service is delivered.

variables.label: Service user types
variables.description: User type codes for the primary service.

variables.label: Service user type labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for service user type codes.

variables.label: Service customer types
variables.description: Customer type codes for the primary service.

variables.label: Service customer type labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for service customer type codes.

variables.label: Service availability regions
variables.description: Region codes where the primary service is available.

variables.label: Service availability region labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for service availability region codes.

variables.label: Children directed
variables.description: Whether the primary service is directed to children.

variables.label: Minimum user age
variables.description: Minimum age required for end users of the service. A value of 0 means not set.

variables.label: All services
variables.description: All product or service profiles for the organization.

variables.label: Primary service
variables.description: The oldest service profile, also exposed through service.* for existing templates.

variables.label: Privacy supported rights
variables.description: Privacy right codes supported by the organization.

variables.label: Privacy supported right labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for supported privacy right codes.

variables.label: Privacy request methods
variables.description: Request method codes accepted for privacy rights requests.

variables.label: Privacy request method labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for privacy request method codes.

variables.label: Privacy response timeline days
variables.description: Number of days the organization targets for privacy request responses. A value of 0 means not set.

variables.label: Identity verification required
variables.description: Whether identity verification is required before fulfilling privacy requests.

variables.label: Authorized agent supported
variables.description: Whether authorized agents can submit privacy requests.

variables.label: Appeal process exists
variables.description: Whether the organization has an appeal process for denied privacy requests.

variables.label: Uses cookies
variables.description: Whether the organization uses cookies or similar tracking technologies.

variables.label: Cookie types
variables.description: Cookie type codes used by the organization.

variables.label: Cookie type labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for cookie type codes.

variables.label: Analytics providers
variables.description: Names of selected analytics providers used by the organization.

variables.label: Analytics provider IDs
variables.description: Catalog provider IDs for selected analytics providers.

variables.label: Advertising providers
variables.description: Names of selected advertising or marketing tracking providers used by the organization.

variables.label: Advertising provider IDs
variables.description: Catalog provider IDs for selected advertising providers.

variables.label: Cookie consent mechanism
variables.description: Cookie consent mechanism code used by the organization.

variables.label: Cookie consent mechanism label
variables.description: Human-readable label for the cookie consent mechanism code.

variables.label: Do Not Track response
variables.description: Whether the organization responds to browser Do Not Track signals.

variables.label: Global Privacy Control supported
variables.description: Whether the organization supports Global Privacy Control signals.

variables.label: Sends marketing emails
variables.description: Whether the organization sends marketing emails.

variables.label: Marketing opt-out method
variables.description: Marketing opt-out method code used by the organization.

variables.label: Marketing opt-out method label
variables.description: Human-readable label for the marketing opt-out method code.

variables.label: Transactional emails sent
variables.description: Whether the organization sends transactional or service emails.

variables.label: Cross-border transfers
variables.description: Whether the organization transfers personal data across borders.

variables.label: Transfer mechanisms
variables.description: Transfer mechanism codes used for cross-border data transfers.

variables.label: Transfer mechanism labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for transfer mechanism codes.

variables.label: Primary hosting region
variables.description: Primary hosting region code. An empty value means not set.

variables.label: Primary hosting region label
variables.description: Human-readable label for the primary hosting region.

variables.label: Data residency options
variables.description: Region codes available for data residency.

variables.label: Data residency option labels
variables.description: Human-readable labels for data residency option region codes.

variables.label: Sells or shares data
variables.description: Whether the organization sells or shares personal data for cross-context behavioral advertising (as defined by CCPA).

variables.label: Do Not Sell link
variables.description: URL for the Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information request page.

variables.label: DPO name
variables.description: Name of the designated Data Protection Officer.

variables.label: DPO email
variables.description: Email address for the Data Protection Officer.

variables.label: EU representative name
variables.description: Name of the designated EU Data Protection Representative.

variables.label: EU representative address
variables.description: Business address for the EU representative.

variables.label: Uses automated decision making
variables.description: Whether the organization uses automated decision-making or profiling with legal or significant effects.

variables.label: Newsletter provider
variables.description: Name of the selected newsletter provider.

variables.label: Newsletter provider ID
variables.description: Catalog provider ID for the selected newsletter provider.

variables.label: Least privilege
variables.description: Whether access follows least-privilege principles.

variables.label: Role-based access
variables.description: Whether access is assigned using roles.

variables.label: Access review cadence
variables.description: Access review cadence code.

variables.label: Access review cadence label
variables.description: Human-readable access review cadence label.

variables.label: Admin approval required
variables.description: Whether administrative access requires approval.

variables.label: MFA required
variables.description: Whether multi-factor authentication is required.

variables.label: SSO supported
variables.description: Whether single sign-on is supported.

variables.label: Password manager required
variables.description: Whether use of a password manager is required.

variables.label: At-rest algorithm label
variables.description: Human-readable encryption-at-rest algorithm label.

variables.label: Minimum TLS version label
variables.description: Human-readable minimum TLS version label.

variables.label: Key management provider label
variables.description: Human-readable key management provider label.

variables.label: Centralized logging
variables.description: Whether centralized logging is enabled.

variables.label: Log retention days
variables.description: Number of days security logs are retained. A value of 0 means unset.

variables.label: Security monitoring owner label
variables.description: Human-readable security monitoring owner label.

variables.label: Scanning cadence label
variables.description: Human-readable vulnerability scanning cadence label.

variables.label: Critical patching SLA days
variables.description: Target days to patch critical vulnerabilities. A value of 0 means unset.

variables.label: High patching SLA days
variables.description: Target days to patch high vulnerabilities. A value of 0 means unset.

variables.label: Incident response plan exists
variables.description: Whether an incident response plan exists.

variables.label: Notification timeline label
variables.description: Human-readable incident notification timeline label.

variables.label: Customer notification process label
variables.description: Human-readable customer notification process label.

variables.label: Incident response last tested date
variables.description: Date when the incident response plan was last tested.

variables.label: Backup cadence label
variables.description: Human-readable backup cadence label.

variables.label: Backup retention days
variables.description: Number of days backups are retained. A value of 0 means unset.

variables.label: Restore testing cadence label
variables.description: Human-readable restore testing cadence label.

variables.label: Vendor review required
variables.description: Whether vendor reviews are required.

variables.label: Vendor review cadence label
variables.description: Human-readable vendor review cadence label.

variables.label: DPA required for processors
variables.description: Whether DPAs are required for processors.

variables.label: At-rest algorithm
variables.description: Encryption-at-rest algorithm code.

variables.label: Minimum TLS version
variables.description: Minimum TLS version code for data in transit.

variables.label: Key management provider
variables.description: Key management provider code.

variables.label: Security monitoring owner
variables.description: Security monitoring owner code.

variables.label: Scanning cadence
variables.description: Vulnerability scanning cadence code.

variables.label: Notification timeline
variables.description: Incident notification timeline code.

variables.label: Customer notification process
variables.description: Customer notification process code.

variables.label: Backup cadence
variables.description: Backup cadence code.

variables.label: Restore testing cadence
variables.description: Restore testing cadence code.

variables.label: Vendor review cadence
variables.description: Vendor review cadence code.

variables.label: Policy effective date
variables.description: Effective date for the generated policy or document.

variables.label: Policy last reviewed date
variables.description: Date when the policy or document was last reviewed.

variables.label: Policy version
variables.description: Version identifier for the generated policy or document.

variables.label: Policy owner name
variables.description: Name of the internal organization member responsible for maintaining the policy or document.

variables.label: Policy owner email
variables.description: Email address of the internal organization member responsible for maintaining the policy or document.

variables.label: Policy approver name
variables.description: Name of the internal organization member that approved the policy or document.

variables.label: Policy approver email
variables.description: Email address of the internal organization member that approved the policy or document.

variables.label: Policy review cadence
variables.description: Expected review cadence for the policy or document.

variables.label: Organization providers
variables.description: Selected providers for critical infrastructure systems.

itemFields.label: System type
itemFields.description: The infrastructure system category, such as cloud, source_control, auth, or password_manager.

itemFields.label: Provider ID
itemFields.description: Catalog identifier for the selected provider.

variables.label: MFA enabled
variables.description: Whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for critical infrastructure.

variables.label: Encrypted devices required
variables.description: Whether employee devices are required to use disk encryption.

variables.label: Backups enabled
variables.description: Whether backups are enabled for important systems or data.

variables.label: Centralized logging enabled
variables.description: Whether logs from important systems are centralized for monitoring or review.

variables.label: Data types stored
variables.description: Categories of data stored by the organization.

itemFields.label: Name
itemFields.description: Name of the data category.

itemFields.label: Description
itemFields.description: Short explanation of what the data category includes.

itemFields.label: Subject types
itemFields.description: People or account types the data category relates to.

itemFields.label: Purposes
itemFields.description: Business or product purposes for collecting or processing the data category.

itemFields.label: Collection methods
itemFields.description: Ways this data category is collected.

itemFields.label: Legal basis
itemFields.description: Legal bases used for processing this data category.

itemFields.label: Retention days
itemFields.description: Number of days this data category is retained. A value of 0 means unset.

itemFields.label: Sensitive
itemFields.description: Whether this data category is considered sensitive.

itemFields.label: Product required
itemFields.description: Whether this data category is required to provide the product or service.

itemFields.label: Shared with third parties
itemFields.description: Whether this data category is shared with third parties.

itemFields.label: Third parties
itemFields.description: Third parties that receive this data category.

variables.label: Stores PII
variables.description: Whether the organization stores personally identifiable information.

variables.label: Stores healthcare data
variables.description: Whether the organization stores healthcare or health-related data.

variables.label: Encryption at rest
variables.description: Whether stored data is encrypted at rest.

variables.label: Encryption in transit
variables.description: Whether data is encrypted while transmitted between systems.

variables.label: Production data in development
variables.description: Whether production data is used in development or test environments.

variables.label: Retention policy exists
variables.description: Whether the organization has a documented data retention policy.

variables.label: MFA required
variables.description: Whether users are required to use multi-factor authentication.

variables.label: SSO enabled
variables.description: Whether single sign-on is enabled for workforce access.

variables.label: Shared accounts exist
variables.description: Whether shared user accounts exist in organization systems.

variables.label: Offboarding process exists
variables.description: Whether the organization has a defined process to remove access for departing personnel.

variables.label: Access reviews performed
variables.description: Whether access reviews are performed for critical systems.

variables.label: Privileged access restricted
variables.description: Whether administrative or privileged access is limited to authorized users.

variables.label: All vendors
variables.description: All vendors recorded in the organization vendor inventory.

itemFields.label: Name
itemFields.description: Vendor name.

itemFields.label: Category
itemFields.description: Vendor category or business function.

itemFields.label: Purpose
itemFields.description: Why the organization uses the vendor.

itemFields.label: Country of registration
itemFields.description: Country where the vendor legal entity is registered.

itemFields.label: Has subprocessors
itemFields.description: Whether the vendor uses subprocessors.

itemFields.label: Data processing level
itemFields.description: Whether the vendor processes no data, limited data, or acts as a subprocessor.

itemFields.label: Data processed
itemFields.description: Organization data categories processed by the vendor.

itemFields.label: DPA status
itemFields.description: Status of the vendor data processing agreement.

itemFields.label: Data regions
itemFields.description: Regions where the vendor processes or stores data.

itemFields.label: Criticality
itemFields.description: Operational criticality of the vendor.

itemFields.label: Owner
itemFields.description: Internal owner responsible for the vendor relationship.

itemFields.label: Notes
itemFields.description: Additional notes about the vendor.

variables.label: Data processors
variables.description: Vendors whose data processing level is limited or subprocessor.
